case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BERMUDEZ, JUAN RICARDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,561.94 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUDEZ, JUAN RICARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
